calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Brenda White, Respondent/Plaintiff;
Josephine Encarnacion representive for Western Dental Services, Inc., for Appellant/Defendant Western Dental Services Inc.;

This cause comes on reguraly for trial de novo. all parties and witnesses are sworn.

All parties stipulate to a Judge Pro Tem.

Brenda White, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence if introduced.

Exhibit 1: Letter from Union Square Endodontics to Western Dental with photo of xrays of Respondent/Plaintiff's tooth.

Josephine Encarnacion testifies on behalf of Western Dental Services, Inc., Appellant/Defendant. No exhibits are introduced.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. After hearing judgment is issued.

JPT Elliot Myles, Clerks William Trupek and Gary Feliciano, Not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-14-2018 Judgment Entered
